sub_mechanisms: M_1 map attention permutation matrix to braid-group element B_n
M_3 compute linking number / Jones polynomial as defect measure
M_4 route token through detect-specific path
stripped_llm_application: A token-attention diagnostic that interprets the attention-induced permutation as a braid-group element, computes a topological invariant (linking number or Jones polynomial), and uses non-trivial values to identify topologically-entangled token sub-groups for special routing.
novelty_claim_stripped: Existing token-importance metrics use attention magnitude / entropy. The candidate uses topological invariants from braid representation as a structurally-different signal.
